name: Neo4j Graph Database
description: Graph database for architecture elements and dependency relationships. Cypher queries for traversal/impact/cascade analysis

name: Redis Cache
description: In-memory store for session management (JWT refresh tokens) and real-time pub/sub (Socket.IO adapter)

name: MinIO Object Storage
description: S3-compatible file storage for document uploads/templates/report exports

name: Hostinger KVM VPS
description: Ubuntu 24.04 production server (76.13.150.49) — Docker host for all services

name: Docker Engine
description: Container runtime — multi-stage builds for shared/server/client packages

name: Caddy Reverse Proxy
description: TLS termination and reverse proxy — routes traffic to Express API and serves static client

name: Node.js v22 Runtime
description: Server-side JavaScript runtime for Express.js backend

name: Express.js API Server
description: Monolith REST API — 25+ route modules (auth/projects/architecture/analytics/governance/simulation/oracle). Helmet/CORS/Morgan middleware

name: React SPA Client
description: Single-page application — React 18 + TypeScript + Vite. 3D visualization (Three.js/R3F) and Tailwind CSS dark theme

name: Socket.IO WebSocket Server
description: Real-time bidirectional communication — SSE streaming for MiroFish simulation rounds and live collaboration events

name: Passport.js Auth Module
description: Authentication middleware — JWT access/refresh tokens + MFA (TOTP) + OAuth2 (Google/GitHub/Microsoft). Session management via Redis

name: MiroFish Simulation Engine
description: Multi-agent swarm intelligence for architecture scenario simulation. 5 preset personas (CTO/BU Lead/IT Ops/Data Architect/CISO). Sequential rounds with emergence tracking

name: Oracle Acceptance Risk Service
description: Lightweight 1-round stakeholder acceptance risk assessment. Parallel LLM calls to 5 personas with weighted scoring (c_level 30%/BU 25%/IT Ops 20%/Data 15%/External 10%)

name: AI Copilot Service
description: Natural language architecture assistant — OpenAI/Anthropic integration with provider fallback. Context-aware responses using architecture graph data

name: Cost Engine Service
description: 4-tier cost estimation (Tier 0 relative/Tier 1 benchmark/Tier 2 parametric COCOMO+Black-Scholes/Tier 3 Monte Carlo PERT). Technology benchmark matching

name: Stochastic Engine Service
description: Kolmogorov probability validation + Beta-PERT distributions + K-S test for architecture drift + cascade risk propagation (BFS with Bayesian dampening)

name: Advisor Service
description: AI architecture advisor — 14 parallel detectors (SPOF/orphans/cycles/compliance/cost/maturity/MiroFish conflicts/cascade/drift/oracle warnings). Health score (5-factor model)

name: Blueprint Generator Service
description: End-to-end architecture blueprint generation — document parsing + AI generation + Neo4j import. Auto-fills from uploaded documents

name: Remediation Engine Service
description: Gap remediation — identify/validate/apply workflow with Seven-Rs strategy recommendations. 41 validator rules

name: Connector Framework
description: Hybrid connector architecture — 10 enterprise integrations (SAP/ServiceNow/LeanIX/Salesforce/n8n/Jira/Citrix/Abacus). Type mappings + sync scheduler

name: Scenario Comparison Engine
description: MCDA-based scenario comparison — cost profiles/compliance scoring/weighted criteria. Side-by-side delta analysis

name: Transformation Roadmap Module
description: Roadmap generator with plateau navigation + wave distribution + CSV cross-workspace import. Target element inclusion

name: Template Marketplace
description: CRUD template store with rating system and 1-click deploy. Architecture pattern library

name: 3D Architecture Visualization
description: Three.js/React Three Fiber — layer planes + node objects + connection lines + risk topology + cost gravity + simulation topology + discussion bubbles

name: ArchiMate 3.2 Modeling Engine
description: Smart palette + quick linker + viewpoint filters + custom patterns. Full ArchiMate element/relationship type support

name: RBAC Authorization System
description: Role-based access control — 6 roles (super_admin to viewer) with granular permissions hierarchy. Project-scoped access

name: Audit Logging System
description: Security audit trail — all sensitive actions logged with IP/user-agent/timestamp. MongoDB-backed with retention policies

name: User & Auth Data
description: User profiles + credentials + preferences + API keys (SHA-256 hashed with ta_ prefix). OAuth provider links

name: Architecture Graph Data
description: Architecture elements (nodes) and relationships (edges) stored in Neo4j. BDAT layers + TOGAF domains + ArchiMate types

name: Project & Workspace Data
description: Projects + workspaces + collaborators + versions + snapshots. MongoDB document model

name: Simulation Run Data
description: MiroFish simulation configs + rounds + agent turns + emergence events + fatigue snapshots + results

name: Oracle Assessment Data
description: Oracle proposals + verdicts + agent verdicts + resistance factors + mitigation suggestions. History with 20-entry cap per query

name: Compliance Snapshot Data
description: Compliance pipeline states + snapshots + standard mappings + requirement scores

name: OpenAI API
description: External LLM provider — gpt-4o-mini for MiroFish/Oracle/Copilot. Streaming support with token accounting

name: Anthropic API
description: External LLM provider (fallback) — claude-haiku-4-5 for MiroFish/Oracle/Copilot. Automatic failover from OpenAI

name: Turbo Monorepo Build System
description: Turborepo — parallel builds with dependency ordering (shared -> server/client). Build caching

name: GitHub Repository
description: Source code repository — MaCeeeee/TheArchitect. CI/CD workflow defined but blocked (account flagged)

name: Vite Build Tool
description: Frontend build tooling — TypeScript compilation + HMR dev server + production bundle (2.2MB gzipped)

name: Architecture Modeling
description: Core business capability — create/edit/visualize enterprise architecture models in ArchiMate 3.2 notation with 3D spatial layouts

name: Portfolio Management
description: Application portfolio lifecycle management — TIME classification + risk/cost/maturity dashboards + stakeholder mapping

name: Governance & Compliance
description: Architecture governance workflows — compliance pipeline + policy enforcement + audit checklists + standard mappings

name: Risk & Impact Analysis
description: Architecture risk assessment — cascade propagation + SPOF detection + blast radius calculation + architecture drift detection

name: Cost Analysis & Optimization
description: Total cost of ownership analysis — 4-tier estimation + scenario comparison + MCDA + budget tracking

name: Transformation Planning
description: Roadmap generation + plateau navigation + gap remediation + Seven-Rs migration strategy + wave distribution

name: Simulation & Forecasting
description: Multi-agent stakeholder simulation (MiroFish) + Oracle acceptance risk + Monte Carlo + capacity planning + what-if scenarios
